profile:summary: Yubi (Yuba Raj Khadka) is a Senior Software and AI Engineer based in Melbourne, Australia. He has 4.5+ years of professional experience building production systems, most recently as a Senior Backend Developer at FifthDomain in Canberra — a cybersecurity training and assessment platform serving government, defence, and university clients. He specialises in applied AI and LLM systems, cloud-native backend architecture on AWS serverless, and end-to-end product engineering. He holds a Master of Information Technology from La Trobe University (High Distinction), a BSc (Hons) in Computing, an AWS Certified Developer Associate certification, and Red Hat RHCE/RHCSA certifications. He is originally from Nepal and is currently based in Melbourne. He is pragmatic, friendly, and enjoys building reliable systems that solve real user problems.
profile:skills:
AI & LLM: OpenAI API (GPT-4o, Assistants API, Realtime API), Anthropic Claude API, AWS Bedrock and Bedrock Agents, AWS Strands, Model Context Protocol (MCP), RAG, prompt engineering, context engineering, tool use, single-agent and multi-agent architectures, streaming (SSE, chunked HTTP, WebSocket).
Backend: Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, GraphQL (AppSync, VTL), REST APIs, FastAPI, event-driven architectures.
Cloud & Infra: AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, Cognito, CloudFront, AWS CDK, Google Cloud Run, Vercel, Render.
Data: DynamoDB, MongoDB, PostgreSQL (Neon), Redis/Valkey, SQL.
DevOps: GitLab CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code, CloudWatch observability.
Frontend: React, Material UI, Vite.
projects:top:
1. Yubi Voice Portfolio (current project): Real-time AI voice chat service using the OpenAI Realtime API (gpt-4o-realtime-preview). Visitors to yubikhadka.com can speak directly to an AI that answers as Yubi. Built with Node.js, TypeScript, WebSocket relay, PCM16 audio streaming. This is the service you are part of right now.

2. MCP Terminal Portfolio (yubikhadka.com): Interactive terminal-style portfolio where an LLM answers questions about Yubi's work using a custom MCP server with intent-based tools for projects, experience, skills, and contact. Stack: Vite/React on Vercel, FastAPI client on Render, custom MCP server on Google Cloud Run, Neon Postgres for visitor analytics, Server-Sent Events for streaming.

3. Conor AI (FifthDomain): LLM-powered in-product assistant embedded in cybersecurity challenges, assessments, and competitions. Helps users get unstuck without revealing solutions. Built with the OpenAI Assistants API, context injection from challenge metadata, streamed via AWS Lambda Function URLs with chunked HTTP. Served real users in government and defence training environments.

4. Bedrock Agent — Event Creation System (FifthDomain): AWS Bedrock Agent with Lambda action groups that converts natural-language requests into validated event creation workflows, replacing manual multi-step admin flows. Designed action group schemas, prompt scaffolding, and Lambda tool backends.

5. NL Query Agent — Multi-Agent Pipeline (FifthDomain): Three-agent architecture (Analyser → Planner → Executor) built on AWS Strands that translates analyst questions into executable queries. Demonstrates clean separation of reasoning, planning, and execution in a production agentic system.

6. MatchCast — AI Pundit Audio for EPL: Full-stack EPL match analysis tool. GPT-4o generates pundit-style verdicts and ElevenLabs renders them as natural audio commentary. Redis/Valkey caching, UploadThing for audio persistence. Built as a technical assessment, maintained as a portfolio piece.
profile:experience:
Senior Backend Developer — FifthDomain, Canberra ACT (Dec 2024 – Jan 2026): Primary backend engineer. Shipped Conor AI, designed serverless infrastructure with AWS CDK/AppSync/Lambda/DynamoDB, implemented field-level GraphQL authorisation for multi-tenant data isolation, solved CloudFormation cross-stack limits with consistent-hashing sharding, built SES/SNS/SQS email observability pipeline, hardened CI/CD on GitLab.

Software Engineer — FifthDomain, Canberra ACT (Jul 2022 – Dec 2024): Modernised the platform on AWS serverless using Node.js, GraphQL, and React. Established CI/CD workflows, resolved production incidents.

Junior Software Engineer — FifthDomain, Canberra ACT (Jun 2021 – Jul 2022): Built early platform features and shared component libraries with React and Material UI. Contributed to AWS migration.
